        <content>
            <![CDATA[
/**
 * Secure Snapshot Service
 * Provides functionality to save data snapshots with validation and sanitization
 */

const fs = require('fs');
const path = require('path');

/**
 * Sanitize and validate file path components to prevent path traversal attacks
 * @param {string} component - The path component to sanitize
 * @returns {string} - Sanitized path component
 */
function sanitizePathComponent(component) {
    // Remove any path traversal attempts
    const sanitized = component.replace(/(\.\.(\/|\\|$))+/g, '');
    
    // Remove any null bytes
    return sanitized.replace(/\0/g, '');
}

/**
 * Validate if a path component contains only safe characters
 * @param {string} component - The component to validate
 * @returns {boolean} - Whether the component is valid
 */
function isValidPathComponent(component) {
    // Only allow alphanumeric characters, hyphens, underscores, and dots
    // This prevents injection of path separators or other dangerous characters
    const safePattern = /^[a-zA-Z0-9._-]+$/;
    return safePattern.test(component);
}

/**
 * Save a data snapshot to a specified category and filename
 * Implements strict validation to prevent path traversal attacks
 * 
 * @param {string} category - The category/directory for the snapshot
 * @param {string} fileName - The name of the snapshot file
 * @param {string} data - The data content to save
 * @throws {Error} - If validation fails or file operations fail
 */
function saveDataSnapshot(category, fileName, data) {
    // Validate inputs are strings
    if (typeof category !== 'string' || typeof fileName !== 'string' || typeof data !== 'string') {
        throw new Error('All parameters must be strings');
    }
    
    // Validate inputs are not empty
    if (!category.trim() || !fileName.trim()) {
        throw new Error('Category and filename cannot be empty');
    }
    
    // Sanitize the inputs
    const sanitizedCategory = sanitizePathComponent(category.trim());
    const sanitizedFileName = sanitizePathComponent(fileName.trim());
    
    // Additional validation for path components
    if (!isValidPathComponent(sanitizedCategory) || !isValidPathComponent(sanitizedFileName)) {
        throw new Error('Invalid characters in category or filename');
    }
    
    // Construct the base directory
    const baseDirectory = '/tmp/resources';
    
    // Resolve the full path
    const fullPath = path.resolve(baseDirectory, sanitizedCategory, sanitizedFileName);
    
    // Ensure the full path is still within the intended base directory
    const resolvedBase = path.resolve(baseDirectory);
    const separator = path.sep;
    
    // Check if the resolved path starts with the base directory path
    if (!fullPath.startsWith(resolvedBase + separator) && fullPath !== resolvedBase) {
        throw new Error('Access denied: path traversal attempt detected');
    }
    
    // Ensure the category directory exists
    const dirPath = path.dirname(fullPath);
    if (!fs.existsSync(dirPath)) {
        fs.mkdirSync(dirPath, { recursive: true });
    }
    
    // Write the data to the file
    try {
        fs.writeFileSync(fullPath, data, 'utf8');
    } catch (error) {
        throw new Error(`Failed to save snapshot: ${error.message}`);
    }
}

module.exports = {
    saveDataSnapshot
};
        ]]>
    </content>
</result>

    // Only allow alphanumeric characters, hyphens, underscores, and dots
    // This prevents injection of path separators or other dangerous characters
    const safePattern = /^[a-zA-Z0-9._-]+$/;
    return safePattern.test(component);
}

/**
 * Save a data snapshot to a specified category and filename
 * Implements strict validation to prevent path traversal attacks
 * 
 * @param {string} category - The category/directory for the snapshot
 * @param {string} fileName - The name of the snapshot file
 * @param {string} data - The data content to save
 * @throws {Error} - If validation fails or file operations fail
 */
function saveDataSnapshot(category, fileName, data) {
    // Validate inputs are strings
    if (typeof category !== 'string' || typeof fileName !== 'string' || typeof data !== 'string') {
        throw new Error('All parameters must be strings');
    }
    
    // Validate inputs are not empty
    if (!category.trim() || !fileName.trim()) {
        throw new Error('Category and filename cannot be empty');
    }
    
    // Sanitize the inputs
    const sanitizedCategory = sanitizePathComponent(category.trim());
    const sanitizedFileName = sanitizePathComponent(fileName.trim());
    
    // Additional validation for path components
    if (!isValidPathComponent(sanitizedCategory) || !isValidPathComponent(sanitizedFileName)) {
        throw new Error('Invalid characters in category or filename');
    }
    
    // Construct the base directory
    const baseDirectory = '/tmp/resources';
    
    // Resolve the full path
    const fullPath = path.resolve(baseDirectory, sanitizedCategory, sanitizedFileName);
    
    // Ensure the full path is still within the intended base directory
    const resolvedBase = path.resolve(baseDirectory);
    const separator = path.sep;
    
    // Check if the resolved path starts with the base directory path
    if (!fullPath.startsWith(resolvedBase + separator) && fullPath !== resolvedBase) {
        throw new Error('Access denied: path traversal attempt detected');
    }
    
    // Ensure the category directory exists
    const dirPath = path.dirname(fullPath);
    if (!fs.existsSync(dirPath)) {
        fs.mkdirSync(dirPath, { recursive: true });
    }
    
    // Write the data to the file
    try {
        fs.writeFileSync(fullPath, data, 'utf8');
    } catch (error) {
        throw new Error(`Failed to save snapshot: ${error.message}`);
    }
}

module.exports = {
    saveDataSnapshot
};
